features.title: Sustainable Engineering
features.description: We build with native species, water-efficient drip systems, and eco-friendly practices that keep Kutch soil fertile for generations.

features.title: Trusted by Farmers
features.description: Quality products at affordable prices through our retail outlets, backed by on-field advice from horticulturists and irrigation engineers.

features.title: Turn-Key Delivery
features.description: One accountable team for survey, design, installation, supply, and maintenance — turnkey projects delivered on time and on budget.
